product.title: Turkmenistan
product.short_des: Desert routes, Ashgabat’s marble cityscape, the Darvaza Gas Crater, Ancient Merv, Yangykala Canyon and Silk Road history.

product.title: Uzbekistan
product.short_des: The heart of the Silk Road, with Samarkand, Bukhara, Khiva, Tashkent, blue-tiled madrasahs, old bazaars and rich cultural routes.

product.title: Kazakhstan
product.short_des: Wide steppe landscapes, Almaty, Charyn Canyon, mountain lakes, modern cities and routes connecting nature with Central Asian culture.

product.title: Kyrgyzstan
product.short_des: Mountain roads, yurt camps, Issyk-Kul Lake, alpine valleys, horse culture and nomad experiences for travelers who love nature.

product.title: Tajikistan
product.short_des: The Pamir Highway, high mountain passes, remote valleys, lakes, villages and some of the most dramatic road journeys in Central Asia.

product.title: Multi-Country Tours
product.short_des: Silk Road journeys across several Central Asian countries, designed for travelers who want one connected route through the region.
